dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne. The village is falling apart. People are saying it can't be stopped.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: People say a lot of things. But this time they're not wrong. Folks are getting sick faster than we can bury them.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Is there anything that can be done?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Sarah. Over at the laboratory. She's been working on something — a cure, she called it. Last I heard she was close.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then I'll go to her.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Careful. The lab's locked, and the power's been out for weeks. You'll need the key — old caretaker kept it on him, and he's resting up at the graveyard now. And George at the powerstation can tell you about the fuse situation.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anything else I should know?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Yes. Last time I saw Sarah, she didn't look well. Whatever she's working on — hurry.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: George. I need the laboratory back on the grid.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Lab's been dark since the surge. Blew the fuse.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Where's the replacement?

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Last one's inside the lab itself. Get it, bring it here, I'll walk you through the install.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Lab's locked. I'm headed to the graveyard for the key.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Then we're not talking yet. Come back when you've got it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah. Anne sent me. You don't look well.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: An accurate observation. I cut myself on a contaminated sample three days ago. The progression is... slower than expected. Interesting, actually.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'm getting the power back on. There's a cure sample at the hospital — I'll bring it, synthesize the antidote, and use it on you.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: The synthesis machine is calibrated. You'll need the cure_sample and active power. Be quick. My cognitive function is still intact, but I cannot guarantee for how long.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Hold on. I'll be back.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Marcus. I need the cure sample stored here.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Sarah's work. Sealed and intact. What's the plan?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Take it to the lab. Synthesize an antidote. Sarah's infected.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Then don't waste time talking to me. Take it. Move.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah. It's ready. Hold still.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Intramuscular, lateral deltoid. Don't hesitate.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Here we go.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: ...thank you. The village has a chance now. So do the rest of them.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah, something doesn't add up. The outbreak, the patrols, the way the roads are locked down — this isn't chaos. It's coordinated.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: I've been thinking the same thing. The strain I've been studying didn't evolve in the wild. The mutation patterns are too clean — engineered.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Engineered? By who?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Whoever built it had a lab better than mine. And the only other facility on this island with that capability is the outpost. There's a man there — a doctor. Viktor's man.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then that's where the answers are.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Be careful. Viktor controls the approach. You'll need a key — there's one stashed in the cave above the village. And talk to Anne before you go. She hears everything that moves through the village.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne. I need to know what you've heard about the outpost. The real story.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Figured you'd come asking sooner or later. You've got that look.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah thinks the outbreak was engineered. Doctor up at the outpost.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Wouldn't surprise me. Viktor's men have been moving crates through here for months. Sealed. Heavy. Heading up to the outpost, never coming back down.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Any way past Viktor?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: He sits in the middle building. The doctor's tucked behind him in the back. You'll have to walk right past Viktor to reach him. And Viktor doesn't move for anyone — not unless he thinks you're useful. Or already broken.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then I'll have to be useful.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Mind yourself. Whatever the doctor's making up there, Viktor's the one who decides who gets it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: George. I'm heading up to the outpost. Anything I should know?

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Their lights run off our grid. If you cut power up there, you cut their cameras, their locks, their comms.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Can you do it?

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Already could. Just needed a reason.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Consider this the reason. Give me thirty minutes once I'm inside.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Done. Watch your back up there.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: You walked right in. Bold. Or stupid. I haven't decided which.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'm here for the doctor.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: The doctor works for me. Anything he has to say, you say to me first.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then tell me why your man is engineering a plague on your own island.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: Engineering? You've been listening to the wrong people. The doctor studies what's already here. Nothing more.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then you won't mind if I ask him myself.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: I mind a great deal. But I'm a reasonable man. Walk through that door. Ask your questions. And remember — every word he says to you, he says with my permission.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: Ah. The variable I have been hearing about. Please — try not to touch anything.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You made the strain. Didn't you.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: I refined it. There is a difference. The base organism is naturally occurring. I merely... improved its transmissibility. Its persistence.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Improved. You killed half the island.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: I documented half the island. The research will outlive every one of you. Including me. That is what matters.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: And Viktor?

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: Viktor provides the conditions. I provide the data. A symbiosis. Or it was — until you arrived.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I need a viable sample. The original strain. Sarah can use it to build something better than what you've made.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: Take it. A sample is meaningless without the methodology. And I assure you — she will not have the methodology.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: We'll see about that.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Marcus. The outbreak — it's not natural. The doctor at the outpost built it. Viktor's been running cover for him the whole time.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Figured it was something like that. Patrols are too organized for a collapse.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah's working on a real cure. I need this place locked down so she has time to finish.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Hospital's a good fallback position. Walls are solid. Just needs reinforcing.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I brought wood. Help me set it.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Drop it. I'll hold the position. You finish what you started.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: It's confirmed. The doctor engineered the strain. Viktor's been protecting him the whole time.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Then we are working against a moving target. Whatever they release next will be calibrated to bypass anything I synthesize now.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then we move faster than they do. I've got Marcus holding the hospital. George is ready to cut their power on my signal. The dock is still a way out if it comes to that.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Good. I'll need a clean sample of the original strain and a stable workspace. Bring me both and I can finish this.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then that's the next move. We end this on our terms.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Agreed. Go. I'll prepare the bench.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah. I think it's time. We need to get people off this island.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: I've been thinking the same. The cure work matters, but it doesn't matter if no one survives long enough to use it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Mary's boat at the dock — it's broken. I have a toolkit but I'll need wood. There's some in the village.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Then start there. Talk to Mary, find out exactly what she needs. And Anne at the store hears everything — she'll know what's moving where.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: What about you?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: I'll keep working. If you get that boat running, come back for me. I'm not leaving my notes behind.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Mary. How bad is the boat?

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Hull's stove in on the port side. Need timber and a proper toolkit to patch her. Without both, she doesn't float.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I have the toolkit. I'll find the wood.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Good. You bring me what I need, I'll get her seaworthy. And anyone who wants out goes with us. No questions, no fees. Just be quick about it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood. I'll be back.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne. Mary's planning to leave. I'm trying to help her get the boat running.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: About time someone tried. You'll want wood — there's a stack in the village square, just outside. Linda might have more out at the farm if you need it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anything else I should know?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Viktor's settled in at the outpost. He won't like people leaving. If you're taking the boat out, keep it quiet until you're ready to sail.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Thanks, Anne. Are you coming with us?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: When the time comes, find me. I won't make a fuss about it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Got the wood and the toolkit. Let's fix her.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Right. Hand me what you've got and we'll work it together. Won't be pretty but she'll hold.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Pretty doesn't matter. Floating does.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Now you're talking like a sailor.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: There she is. Tight as she'll get. I'll prep the lines.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'm going for Sarah. She has work she won't leave behind.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Be quick. Tide doesn't wait, and neither does Viktor when he figures out what we're doing.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Keep the engine warm. We're leaving this island tonight.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Aye. Bring whoever's coming. There's room enough.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Boat's fixed. Mary's holding the lines. Grab your notes — we're going.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: You actually did it. Give me ten seconds.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne's coming too. Anyone else who wants out, we pick up on the way.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Then let's not waste the tide. After you.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: After me.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Cast off, Mary. Everyone who's coming is here.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Then sit down and hold on. We're going home — or somewhere like it.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Goodbye, island.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Goodbye.
